content:
# Recommendations — for the iter-003 plan agent

## HIGH — act this iter

### SNAP: build the 3 `tensorPowAdd`-coherence prerequisites BEFORE retrying the coherences
The 3 open coherences (`sectionsMul_mul_one`, `_mul_assoc`, `_mul_comm`) are NOT closable by the
`sectionsMul_one_mul` template — that worked only because `tensorPowAdd L 0 n` iota-reduces on the
literal `0`. The others match a variable index. **Do NOT re-dispatch a prover at the three coherences
directly** (it will re-derive the same wall). Instead assign, as their own prove tasks (each = an
induction on the `tensorPowAdd` recursion):
- `tensorPowAdd_succ_zero` / right-unitor reduction of `tensorPowAdd L n 0` → unblocks `mul_one`.
- `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (associativity coherence) → unblocks `mul_assoc`.
- `tensorPowAdd_braiding`: `tensorPowAdd L na nb = tensorBraiding _ _ ≫ tensorPowAdd L nb na ≫ eqToIso(add_comm)`
  → unblocks `mul_comm`.
Then the section-level cores close fast via the `unitor_sectionsMul` template (and the even-simpler
`braiding_sectionsMul`, which needs only unit-naturality of the presheaf braiding — no counit/triangle).
Consider an `effort-breaker` on whichever coherence stays hard after the prerequisite lands.

### FBC: the chain is blocked on one piece of infra — do NOT dispatch provers at the frontier nodes yet
`baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso` is the irreducible module-level gap (⇔ `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`).
It needs the per-chart `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` (Stacks 01I9) restriction-compatibility over a finite
cover of a non-affine `X`, plus tensor-commutes-with-finite-products — the SAME multi-hundred-LOC,
Mathlib-absent infrastructure that `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` (FlatBaseChange.lean) is blocked on.
`flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso_of_isSeparated` and `_mayerVietoris` both transitively need it.
- **Recommended**: scope an infra lane (dag-walker / effort-breaker on `lem:base_changed_equalizer_diagram`)
  to design the per-chart dictionary + finite-cover assembly before any prover attempt. Until that exists,
  these 3 nodes are not ready (their `\uses` under-declares the missing infra).
- **Closest-to-completion FBC target**: the bridge reverse direction
  (`flatBaseChange_isIso_iff_gammaTensorComparison`, forward already proven). First **verify
  qcqs-pushforward-quasicoherent exists in Mathlib** (planner flagged this in iter-001 too); then the
  reverse is "iso on global sections ⇒ iso of QC sheaves over affine" via tilde full-faithfulness. This
  is the one FBC node that does NOT depend on the heavy per-chart infra.

### fbcg002 MAJOR — hypothesis gaps in the 3 FBC chain signatures (blueprint↔Lean)
The scaffolded decls under-constrain vs the blueprint prose:
- `baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso`: blueprint requires `[IsSeparated X]` + finite affine cover;
  Lean signature omits them.
- `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`: blueprint requires qcqs (`[CompactSpace X]`, `[QuasiSeparatedSpace X]`).
- `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`: blueprint requires qcqs + `[F.IsQuasicoherent]`.
Decide before the infra lane whether to (a) tighten these Lean signatures now (a `refactor` task — note
they are not protected) or (b) carry the gap until the infra lane fixes shapes. Report:
`logs/iter-002/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-fbcg002-report.md`. (This repeats iter-001's qcqs flag — settle it.)

## MEDIUM

### Restore 1-to-1 blueprint coverage for 4 new SNAP helpers (`archon dag-query unmatched`)
All in `namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules`, in `SectionGradedRing.lean`. The planner authors the
prose (review agent does not):
- `unitor_sectionsMul` (L~1645) — **the substantive one**: `Γ(tensorObjUnitIso G)(sectionsMul (unit) G (1⊗a)) = a`,
  the adjunction-triangle core of `lem:sectionMul_coherent`'s left-unit case. Worth a NAMED blueprint
  lemma (its proof depends on `tensorObjUnitIso_hom`, `sheafificationCounitIso`,
  `PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction`, `Adjunction.homEquiv_{unit,counit}`,
  `ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_hom_apply`). Both sgr002 and the prover recommend elevating it.
- `tensorObjUnitIso_hom` (L~1631) — `(tensorObjUnitIso G).hom = sheafification.map (λ_p).hom ≫ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom` (rfl). Uses: `tensorObjUnitIso`, `sheafificationCounitIso`.
- `tensorPowAdd_zero` (L~1623) — `tensorPowAdd L 0 n = tensorObjUnitIso (tp n) ≪≫ eqToIso …` (rfl). Uses: `tensorObjUnitIso`, `tensorPowAdd`.
- `val_app_top_comp` (L~1614) — `Γ(f ≫ g)(x) = Γ(g)(Γ(f)(x))` at the top open (rfl). Currently unused
  by the closed proofs (they use `show`); keep or drop, but blueprint it if kept.

### la002 MAJOR — dangling `tensorObjRightUnitor` reference (`SectionGradedRing.lean:55`)
Module header lists `tensorObjRightUnitor` as a main definition but it was never defined (the cross-ref
was deleted with the ~255-line block this iter). Have the next prover/refactor either define it or strike
the header line. Low-effort doc fix. Report: `logs/iter-002/lean-auditor-la002-report.md`.

## LOW (notes, no action required this iter)
- la002 minor: `FlatBaseChange.lean:979,1014-1017` — stacked `set_option maxHeartbeats … in` on `/-!`
  comment blocks are no-ops; will mislead once the bodies are filled. Fix when those decls get proved.
- la002 minor: `SectionGradedRing.lean:19-23` module docstring understates scope (now has the full graded
  assembly).
- sgr002 minor: `def:sectionGradedRing` `\lean{}` pin points at `sectionDeg` (carrier family), not the
  ring structure `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` (which has its own block). Low impact.

## Do-NOT-retry (blocker stable ≥1 iter)
- The 3 SNAP coherences via the `one_mul` tactic shape — needs the `tensorPowAdd`-coherence prerequisites
  first (structural change, not more tactics).
- `baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso` / separated / MV directly — blocked on per-chart
  `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` infra; no in-file shortcut exists (proven ⇔ `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`).
- `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` / the abstract mate route — known-abandoned (per ARCHON_MEMORY).

## Reusable patterns discovered this iter
- **Adjunction-transpose section core** (`unitor_sectionsMul`): to prove `Γ(structural-iso)(η(elementary
  tensor)) = …`, use `(adj.homEquiv _ _).apply_eq_iff_eq_symm_apply.mpr (Adjunction.homEquiv_counit adj _ _ _).symm`
  — the `homEquiv.symm` form IS the `map(structural)^# ≫ counit` composite; the `.mpr`'s defeq check
  absorbs the `sheafification=adj.left` / `counitIso=adj.counit` defeqs. Then `homEquiv_unit`, `congrArg`,
  `exact`. Generalizes to braiding/associator coherence section cores.
- **`show` (default transparency) splits `Γ(f≫g)(x)` + realigns elements** where positional `rw` fails at
  reducible transparency under the tensorObj/sheafification.obj diamond. `rw` on a unit index → ill-typed
  motive; `show` avoids it.
- **FBC: wrap an `eqLocus` codomain in `ModuleCat.of <explicit groundRing carrier> (…)`** to fix
  "failed to synthesize AddCommMonoid" when slotting a `≃ₗ` into a `restrictScalars`-functor object.
